name: Home Categories Strip
description: A horizontal strip of colorful 'tiles' representing different trip types or categories. Each tile includes an icon, a title, a tag link, and an 'Explore' CTA, designed to guide users to specific trip listings.

field_schema.label: Category Tiles
field_schema.help: Four tiles fit the strip best.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.help: The name or title of this tile.

sub_fields.label: Trip Tag
sub_fields.help: Pick a trip tag. Link auto-points to /trips?tag=<slug>.

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.help: Call-to-action. The text label is always shown. The URL is only used when no Trip Tag is selected above.

sub_fields.label: Bubble Color
sub_fields.help: Choose the theme color for this tile.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.help: Select the icon that best represents this tile.
